## Summary

<!-- What does this change do, and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup
- [ ] Documentation

## Checklist

- [ ] `./gradlew clean test build` passes locally
- [ ] `./gradlew spotlessApply` run (formatting clean)
- [ ] Tests added or updated for the change
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated for user-visible changes
- [ ] Platform types kept out of `menu-core`

<!-- Anything reviewers should know: trade-offs, follow-ups, screenshots. -->
